en-GB.name: Six Music Skipper
en-GB.summary: Play the live 6 Music news skipper stream.
en-GB.description: Plays the live 6 Music news skipper stream.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Six Music Skipper to play
Alexa, tell Six Music Skipper to start

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Set the Lambda STREAM_URL environment variable to the deployed HTTPS stream URL before testing.
